evals.name: test-verification
evals.prompt: 验证分支 feature/backend/TASK-101-user-auth 的所有测试是否通过，branch_type=feature, module=backend
expectations: Should indicate running the test suite
Should report test pass/fail status clearly
Should reference the branch being tested

evals.name: branch-status-check
evals.prompt: 检查分支 feature/backend/TASK-101-user-auth 是否准备好完成: check_uncommitted=true, check_upstream=true, check_tests=true
expectations: Should verify no uncommitted changes remain
Should verify branch is synced with upstream
